scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm -w @singedterra/client run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @singedterra/shared run typecheck && npm -w @singedterra/client run typecheck
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npx tsx scripts/checks/determinism.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/collision.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/timestep.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/turnstate.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/airburst.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/wind.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/ammo.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/motion.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/shield.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/store.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/ai.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/lockstep.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/turn_rotation.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/rounds.mjs
